title: Khinkali
description: A simple mod that adds khinkali to the game
body:
# **About** **Simple mod that add new food item - Khinkali.
Khinkali is a dish made from lamb and wheat.** # **Recipe** ![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8a80b73b34a104c1d9c2bd0c4b340084c7f1585.png) # **Installing** 1. **Install Fabric mod loader**
2. **Install Fabric API**
3. **Move the .jar to the mods folder** # **Supported languages:** - **English** - **Ukrainian** - **Georgian** - **Russian** - **German** - **Spanish** - **Italian** - **Сhinese**
